choices.text: Wagmi + viem + RainbowKit/ConnectKit + TanStack Query. viem typed contracts; Wagmi hooks (useAccount, useReadContract, useWriteContract); RainbowKit wallet UX. Standard 2024+ stack.
client.multicall({ contracts: [...] }) — batches into one RPC call. Read balanceOf + decimals + symbol in one round trip. Significant latency + RPC cost improvement for token displays.

questions.explanation: Multicall batches reads in one RPC call.
